## What & why

## Both-questions check (Tritium prime directive)

- [ ] **Fun / guided / gamified:** how does this make the simulator better?
- [ ] **Production capability:** what real capability does it validate or harden?

## Verification

- [ ] `./scripts/check.sh` green (markdown + privacy + syntax + JS)
- [ ] Any new/changed `​```mermaid`​` diagram passes `scripts/mermaid_github_check.sh` (renders on GitHub, not just mmdc)
- [ ] Ran it / looked at it — not just "tests pass"
